entities.name: Burden Shifting Primitive

relationships.context: The primitive is the rhetorical expression of V's automation philosophy
Applied in hiring domain — automate screening/matching so humans focus on judgment and relationship
AI is the mechanism that enables the burden shift from mechanical to human-indispensable
